title: steris sartorii
intro: Steris sartorii, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species native to the Kalahari Desert in southern Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its iridoid glycosides, specifically harpagoside, which have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Steris sartorii include relief from arthritis, muscle and joint pain, as well as digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Steris sartorii can be found in the form of capsules, tablets, and teas, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
